_meta.description: Golden dataset for integrity.molt scan accuracy regression testing
sources: SolRPDS: A Dataset for Analyzing Rug Pulls in Solana DeFi (arxiv 2504.07132)

categories.safe: Verified legitimate tokens — mint/freeze authority renounced, deep liquidity
categories.scam: Verified rug pulls from SolRPDS academic dataset, pool inactive
categories.edge: Legitimate tokens with features that may trigger false positives

tokens.name: USD Coin
tokens.reason: Circle stablecoin, mint authority = null, freeze authority = null, rugcheck score 0

tokens.name: Tether USD
tokens.reason: Tether stablecoin, mint authority = null, freeze authority = null, rugcheck score 0

tokens.name: Wrapped SOL
tokens.reason: Canonical wrapped native SOL, system token, mint/freeze null

tokens.name: Jupiter
tokens.reason: Jupiter DEX governance token, mint/freeze authority revoked, rugcheck score 7

tokens.name: Bonk
tokens.reason: Largest Solana memecoin, mint/freeze authority revoked, rugcheck score 7

tokens.name: Raydium
tokens.reason: Raydium AMM governance token, mint/freeze authority revoked. High top10 concentration is DAO treasury — not a scam signal
tokens.notes: Scanner may flag high top-10 concentration — this is acceptable as CAUTION but not DANGER

tokens.name: dogwifhat
tokens.reason: Memecoin, mint/freeze revoked, rugcheck score 1. Tests false alarm on mutable metadata + no LP lock
tokens.source: Coinbase Assets + Solana Explorer + rugcheck API

tokens.name: Popcat
tokens.reason: Memecoin, mint/freeze revoked, rugcheck score 1. Tests 'technically clean' memecoin without LP lock
tokens.source: Coinbase Assets + Solana Explorer + rugcheck API

tokens.name: PayPal USD
tokens.reason: Token-2022 with Permanent Delegate + Transfer Fee extensions. Legitimate stablecoin but extensions trigger false positives. Tests context-aware scanner
tokens.notes: Permanent Delegate is a real risk signal but Paxos is regulated — scanner should flag but not DANGER
tokens.source: PayPal/Paxos official + Solana Explorer + rugcheck API

tokens.name: BonkEarn
tokens.reason: Token-2022 with Transfer Fee Extension. Legitimate Bonk ecosystem token but transfer fee triggers scam warning in many tools
tokens.source: Phantom developer docs (Token-2022 example) + rugcheck API

tokens.name: OFFICIAL TRUMP
tokens.reason: Legitimate token (issued by Trump Org), mint/freeze revoked, but 80% supply in one wallet (CIC Digital LLC). Tests 'concentrated but legitimate' vs rug pull distinction
tokens.notes: High concentration is real risk signal. CAUTION is correct. DANGER would be a false positive
tokens.source: TRM Labs trace + Solana Explorer + rugcheck API (score 58)
